time_sec.description: Timestamp in seconds from video start

x.description: Horizontal center of main subject as fraction, 0.0=left edge 1.0=right edge

y.description: Vertical center of main subject as fraction, 0.0=top edge 1.0=bottom edge

description.description: Brief description of the subject at this point

time_sec.description: Timestamp of the scene change in seconds

description.description: Brief description of the scene transition
